stagedChanges.change: Review whether 'What Is an Expert?' should remain active, be re-dated, or be archived out of the immediate week.

stagedChanges.change: Tighten the next step wording so Apr 1 is the forcing point: analyze survey + get Melanie constraints + shape rough run-of-show for working-group review.

stagedChanges.change: Review the JFC charter / proposal deck item and either mark it completed, re-date it, or rewrite the next step around scheduling and partner-group follow-up.
stagedChanges.why: It is still open with a Mar 30 due date in live To-Dos, but recent memory only confirms Brent support and a handoff to charter/proposal work, not final completion.

stagedChanges.change: Review the Mar 31 canonical deck / persona-model items and decide whether they should stay active for this week, be re-dated, or be collapsed into the HR Apr 8 workshop prep line.

stagedChanges.change: Consider mirroring the live 'refresh deck for HR, due 4/3' note into the source workshop lane if that is now the operative prep milestone before the Apr 8 session.
